ab: Mahtu aupa saikin simul suan mas sui?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Mahtu na pia su sui asaun simulun?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Sipungulik madas mas sui adu mahtuik simul suan mas sui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ni amin saikin mainadas sui.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Sipunglik madas mas sui adu mahtuik suan simul mas sui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ni, tangusang tu sinimul hai niang kasu masuhisi.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Adu mahtuhik simul isu ulus?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Mahtu, Kana’nanka siza.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Adu mahtuik simul isu tu patasan?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Ispasimulinku Savi.
en: B: I lent it to Savi.

ab: Pasimulavang saikin isu tu tauntun laili?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Mahtu, kaz asatu suhaisun mais kutunin.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Hudananin nik mainadas talulung pasimulavik talulung ha?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: Kaznak tasa talulung, muskun ta talulungan.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Sain hai sinimulku tu tangusang tu patasan sahaisunku su-an.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Maz su asaun saduan tu patasan mahtu tahu mas zaku i.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Lakuinik na masuhis mas suan sui?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Nitu makua tudipin mais aizin su sui.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Lakuabinin kasu masuhis mas zaku sui?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Nakutunin masuhis mas sui.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Lakuain kasu masuhis zaku patasan?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Tupi suhaisunin ku takna?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Avandi ispatasan hai sinimulan su sia Vilian?
en: A: Did Vilian lend you this pen?

ab: Mamantuk sinimul ku aip tu hanian.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Avandi ispatasan hai sinimulan sia Vilian?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Vilian?

ab: Ni, sain hai sinbaliv cina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Ukin na hasila munsaina Abus simul tu kauman.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Abus.

ab: Ung, mundipik simul.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Tupai a Akuan tu masuhaisa sui.
en: B: Go tell Akuan to give me my money back.

ab: Pia saicia sinimulan suan sui?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
